sglang.title: fix qwen3-omni audio length < 30s
sglang.author: jiapingW
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The qwen3 Omni series models, due to their use of the WhisperFeatureExtractor class, limit the chunk size to 30 seconds, causing truncation regardless of the input length. It would be desirable to support Omni models in processing complete audio. Fix the bug here.

Accuracy

vllm.title: [CI] Reduce Blackwell Fusion test runtime by filtering tests and only run all tests in nightly
vllm.author: copilot-swe-agent
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR reduces Blackwell Fusion test runtime in CI by:

Adding a new optional "Blackwell Fusion E2E Tests" CI group that runs all test combinations (for nightly builds)
Filtering the non-optional "Blackwell Fusion Tests" to run only a focused subset of tests
Filtering the "PyTorch Fullgraph
